original_image_tags: Scan of a yellowed document page, showing bleed-through/ghosting of typed text from the reverse side. The page contains several stamps and faint, reversed text.
Faint, reversed typed text visible through the paper from the other side of the page. The text appears to be a formal letter. Visible reversed words and phrases include:

elements.description: A rectangular ink stamp near the center reading 'COMM-181' and 'OCT 1 1966' with 'MAIL RD II' above it.
A circular ink stamp in the bottom right corner reading 'RECEIVED-DIRECTOR F. B. I.' with the date 'Oct 17 4 08 PM '66'.

judge.reason: Description A describes general visual content (stamps, reversed text) but provides no specific quoted text, while Description B provides specific, detailed quoted text from two distinct stamps, creating a factual inconsistency on the specific verbatim content present.
